_comment: === APP COSTA BANANA INTELLIGENCE REACTIVE EXAMPLE ===
_description: Costa Bananas bakery example: banana bread recipes, ingredients with nutritional data, baking batches, supplier management, normative processes (Baking Process 5-stage and Ingredient Acquisition 3-stage), and intelligence artifacts for calorie, weight, and nutritional analysis.

description.en: Baking batch lifecycle status enumeration
Ingredient classification by type
Ingredient order lifecycle status enumeration
Delivery shipment lifecycle status enumeration
Nutritional metric type enumeration
Recipe template for banana bread variants
Individual ingredient with nutritional data

universals._comment: === ENTITY UNIVERSAL: Baking Batch (Subject of Baking Process) ===

description.en: A production batch of banana bread loaves - subject of the Baking Process

universals._comment: === ENTITY UNIVERSAL: Ingredient Order (Subject of Acquisition Process) ===

description.en: Purchase order for ingredients from suppliers - subject of the Acquisition Process
Ingredient supplier company
Shipping and logistics tracking for baked goods
Packaged final product ready for delivery
Materialized intelligence artifact output universal
Responsible for ingredient setup and baking execution
Responsible for pre-baking quality control checks
Responsible for packaging and shipment coordination
Responsible for ingredient procurement and supplier management
Final authority for delivery approval and receipt sign-off
Composition: a recipe contains an ingredient with a specific quantity
Association: a baking batch follows a specific recipe
Association: an order is placed for a specific ingredient
Association: an order is placed with a supplier
Association: a delivery shipment carries products from a baking batch
Derivation: a baking batch produces packaged products
Attribution: an ingredient has a nutritional metric value
Emitted when a baking batch is approved through all process stages
Emitted when a baking batch is rejected at any process stage
Emitted when an ingredient order is approved through all acquisition stages
Emitted when average calories per ingredient category exceeds 300 kcal
Emitted when total ingredient weight in a recipe exceeds 2000 grams
Emitted when total fat per ingredient category exceeds 15 grams
Emitted when an ingredient order is rejected at any acquisition stage
Calorie analysis of ingredients by category and recipe, with high-calorie threshold alert
Weight distribution of ingredients by category and recipe with heavy-recipe threshold
Nutritional breakdown by ingredient category with high-fat threshold alert

Banana bread bakery management with recipes, ingredients, baking batches, supplier management, normative processes for baking and ingredient acquisition, and intelligence artifacts for nutritional analysis
Normative processes: baking batch approval (5-stage) and ingredient acquisition (3-stage)
